targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', as_of_date_local) AS INTEGER) AS time, vs_benchmark_excess_1y_pct AS "Excess 1y %", tracking_error_1y_pct AS "Tracking Error %", information_ratio_1y AS "Info Ratio", beta_portfolio AS "Beta" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', as_of_date_local) AS INTEGER) AS time, vs_benchmark_excess_1y_pct AS "Excess 1y %", tracking_error_1y_pct AS "Tracking Error %", information_ratio_1y AS "Info Ratio", beta_portfolio AS "Beta" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', as_of_date_local) AS INTEGER) AS time, top3_weight_pct AS "Top3 %", top5_weight_pct AS "Top5 %", vs_benchmark_corr_1y AS "Corr 1y" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', as_of_date_local) AS INTEGER) AS time, top3_weight_pct AS "Top3 %", top5_weight_pct AS "Top5 %", vs_benchmark_corr_1y AS "Corr 1y" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
